title: KynticAI Scout Discovery MCP — Public Tool Schemas
description: Stable public tool interface definitions for the Scout Discovery Agent MCP layer (OSS-022). Breaking changes require a major version bump.

scout_list_connectors.description: Lists all registered KynticAI Scout connector plugins with public metadata. Returns connector type, display name, description, aliases, and supported data source kinds.

scout_inspect_sample_schema.description: Inspects the configuration schema and sample configuration for a specific connector. Accepts a connector type identifier or alias.

connectorType.description: Connector type or alias to inspect (e.g. "sqlDatabase", "restApi", "mock").

outputSchema.description: On success returns connector metadata; on failure returns { error, availableTypes }.

scout_summarise_metadata.description: Summarises all available public metadata: registered connectors, semantic attribute keys, data source kinds, and connector capabilities.

scout_validate_connector_manifest.description: Validates a connector manifest JSON against the expected KynticAI Scout connector structure. Checks required fields, schema structure, and sample configuration completeness.

manifest.description: JSON string of the connector manifest to validate.

scout_validate_connector_manifest_v2.description: Validates an extended connector manifest against the full KynticAI Scout public schema. Checks connector ID format, semver version, supported source types, required config fields, safe metadata fields (rejects credential/PII leaks), and sample entity mappings.

manifest.description: JSON string of the extended connector manifest to validate.

knownConnectorIds.description: Optional comma-separated list of existing connector IDs to check for duplicates.

scout_read_connector_manifest.description: Reads the full connector manifest for a given connector type or alias. Returns all fields including configurationSchema, sampleConfiguration, supportedCapabilities, aliases, and description.

connectorType.description: Connector type or alias to read (e.g. "sqlDatabase", "restApi", "csvUpload").

outputSchema.description: On success returns full connector manifest; on failure returns { error, hint, availableTypes }.

scout_validate_manifest_schema_compatibi.description: Validates that a connector manifest's configurationSchema is compatible with a provided schema. Checks field presence, type alignment, and required-field coverage in the sample configuration.

manifest.description: JSON string of the connector manifest to check.

schema.description: JSON string of the target schema to validate against.

scout_summarise_connectors.description: Produces a detailed summary of all available connectors including per-connector field counts, capability coverage matrix, data source kind distribution, and alias totals.

scout_metadata_quality_report.description: Produces a local metadata quality report by running the Scout metadata audit runner against a connector manifest and optional sample records. Returns readiness scores, field classifications, warnings, and recommendations.

manifest.description: JSON string of the connector manifest to audit.

sampleRecords.description: Optional JSON string of an array of sample records. Each record should have externalUserId (string), optional observedAtUtc (string), and payload (object).

outputSchema.description: On success returns audit report; on failure returns { error, hint }.
